name: AI Information Clear, Fair, Not Misleading
description: Information provided to clients on the firm's use of AI is presented in a clear, fair and not misleading manner.
rationale: ESMA ¶8: when firms provide clients with information on how they use AI tools, they ensure such information is presented in a clear, fair and not misleading manner.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
